trade.summary: Strong bilateral trade relationship. The Regno Unito exports financial services, whisky, pharmaceuticals, and luxury goods to Giappone. Giappone exports automobiles, electronics, and precision machinery to the Regno Unito. The Regno Unito-Giappone Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA, 2021) secured and enhanced trade ties post-Brexit.

diplomatic.summary: Regno Unito-Giappone relations have been elevated to a Global Strategic Partnership. Both countries share strong alignment on rules-based international order, Indo-Pacific security, and NATO-adjacent cooperation. Giappone-Regno Unito ties strengthened significantly through the GCAP fighter programme, the Hiroshima Accord (2023), and Giappone's new global security role. The Regno Unito is Giappone's primary European ally.

military.summary: Among the deepest Regno Unito military partnerships outside traditional allies. GCAP (Global Combat Air Programme) is the flagship — Regno Unito, Giappone, and Italia jointly developing next-generation fighter jet. Reciprocal Access Agreement (2023) allows each country's forces to deploy from the other's bases. Joint exercises increasing in scale and frequency. Both countries deeply aligned on Cina and Russia threat assessments.

financial.summary: London is the primary European financial centre for Giapponeese banks and insurers. Giapponeese companies (Toyota, Honda, Nissan) have major Regno Unito manufacturing operations. Giapponeese institutional investors hold significant Regno Unito gilts and equities. Regno Unito financial services deeply integrated with Giapponeese capital markets.

energy.summary: Some bilateral LNG trade (Regno Unito imports, Giappone exports via trading). Cooperation in offshore wind technology and hydrogen. Regno Unito nuclear expertise (Rolls-Royce SMRs) is of interest to Giappone as it restarts nuclear capacity.

scientific.summary: Strong research partnership. GCAP involves deep technology exchange. Cooperation in AI, quantum computing, life sciences, and materials. Regno Unito-Giappone Science and Innovation Council active. Many Giapponeese researchers work in Regno Unito universities. Joint projects in fusion energy (ITER-related).
